reviews.review_msg: Agree w/ 1st rating. Lectures are vague and not helpful for understanding key terms and concepts. I found i had to do extra research on my own to fill in the blanks (and there were many). She's not clear about what is important or how to relate it to what you've learned previously. But she's really nice and you can tell she likes the subject.

Nice person but incredibly dull lectures. Have to rely on the textbook as she doesn't teach that much. You will have a page maybe two of notes for each class and she will waste time on trying to get a discussion but isn't really good at getting them going. This is a 3 hour lecture not seminar or tutorial. I wish she would TEACH!
